subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Lord of existence maketh mention of thee from His glorious station, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy Lord, the Almighty, the All-Loving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود یذکرک مالک الوجود من مقامه المحمود لتشکر ربک العزیز الودود انا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
